## Governance impact

- [ ] Requires an OpenAPI contract change (ADR-001 / ADR-005) — contract first
- [ ] Requires a new ADR (architectural decision; ≥ ADR-009)
- [ ] Touches a clinical/financial invariant (ADR-002 / ADR-006) — needs architect review
- [ ] Adds a new dependency (requires documented justification)
- [ ] Documentation only
